data.title: Fortis Inc. Announces $500 Million Share Distribution Plan
data.description:
Fortis (TSE:FTS) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Fortis Inc. has entered into an agreement with several Canadian and U.S. financial agents to issue and sell common shares worth up to $500 million. The shares will be distributed through various marketplaces, including the TSX and NYSE, under specific conditions outlined in their equity distribution agreement. This move is expected to enhance Fortis’s financial strategy and market presence.

Polymetals Resources Ltd. announced a change in director David Sproule’s shareholdings, with his Sproule Superannuation Fund increasing its stake by acquiring 1,000,000 fully paid ordinary shares, valued at $920,000. Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust has declared a December 2024 distribution of $0.0717 per unit, translating to $0.86 annually, payable to unitholders on January 15, 2025. data.title: Lanthanein Extends Lady Grey Project Agreement
data.description:
Frontier Resources Limited (AU:LNR) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Lanthanein Resources Limited has extended its farm-in agreement with Gondwana Resources for the Lady Grey Project by six months, allowing more time to finalize drilling and secure assays. This extension involves a $200,000 cash payment to Gondwana, which will be counted as exploration expenditure. The delay was primarily due to pending approvals from regulatory bodies and scheduling heritage surveys.

For further insights into AU:LNR stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Black Cat Syndicate Targets Expansion at Mt Clement
data.description:
Black Cat Syndicate Ltd. (AU:BC8) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Black Cat Syndicate Ltd. aims to expand its Mt Clement antimony and gold project in 2025, leveraging existing infrastructure to reduce costs and time. The project, located in Western Australia’s Pilbara region, is one of the most advanced antimony ventures in Australia, with significant potential for resource growth through extensive drilling and exploration. As antimony prices rise, Black Cat is eyeing strategic partnerships to maximize this opportunity in the critical defense minerals sector.

For further insights into AU:BC8 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Duolingo Welcomes Bonnie Ross to Board of Directors
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Duolingo ( (DUOL) ) has shared an update.

Duolingo, the leading mobile learning platform, has appointed gaming industry veteran Bonnie Ross to its Board of Directors. With 30 years in the gaming sector, including key roles at Microsoft, Ross brings expertise in creating engaging experiences and expanding global franchises like Halo. Her appointment aligns with Duolingo’s mission to make learning fun and accessible, leveraging her passion for innovative and entertaining educational experiences.

data.title: Summit Minerals Begins Drilling at Barra Lithium Project
data.description:
Summit Minerals Limited (AU:SUM) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Summit Minerals Limited has launched its first drilling program at the Barra Lithium Project in Brazil, aiming to explore potential lithium-bearing pegmatites following promising groundwork. The project, strategically located near the active Miranda Lithium mine, involves up to 3,000 meters of reverse circulation drilling to assess new quartz outcrops and regional trend alignments. This initiative reflects Summit’s commitment to enhancing shareholder value and contributing to the global battery mineral supply chain.

For further insights into AU:SUM stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:

Inmune Bio ( (INMB) ) has provided an announcement.

INmune Bio Inc. authorized stock options for its non-employee directors and key executives, allowing them to purchase shares at $5.05 under the 2021 Stock Incentive Plan. These options, granted on December 4, 2024, will be fully vested by December 5, 2026, and expire in 2034, providing an opportunity for potential long-term gains as part of their compensation strategy.

data.title: Shineco Announces New Independent Director Appointment
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

An update from Shineco ( (SISI) ) is now available.

Shineco Inc. has announced the resignation of independent director Mr. Aamir Ali Quraishi, to be replaced by Mr. Jun Fu, effective December 17, 2024. Mr. Fu, appointed on December 3, 2024, brings a wealth of expertise in financial services and corporate governance. He will serve on several committees, including as Chairman of the Nominating Committee. The transition is smooth with no disagreements or transactions requiring disclosure, ensuring continued robust governance.

Learn more about SISI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
